AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.work_description: P-101A pump trip — high vibration alarm, motor overcurrent protection activated. Pump shutdown required for bearing inspection.
AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.findings: Drive-end bearing found completely failed — extensive spalling on inner race. Grease nipple found blocked. Bearing NDE also shows significant fatigue marks. Shaft seal showed minor weeping.
AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.actions_taken: Replace Drive End and Non-Drive End bearings; flush and refill bearing housing with Shell Gadus S2 V220 2 grease; re-establish 2-weekly lubrication schedule
AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.parts_replaced: SKF 6316-2RS1 bearing x2; bearing housing seal x1

AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.work_description: K-201 LP Compressor surge event — compressor tripped on surge protection after multiple surge cycles. High suction scrubber level alarm coincided with surge onset. K-202 started from standby.
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.findings: Liquid traces found in compressor casing and on impeller stages. LCV-101 (scrubber level control valve) found with failed actuator diaphragm — valve stuck 70% open. Mist eliminator heavily loaded with liquid.
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.actions_taken: Overhaul LCV-101 actuator and positioner; clean scrubber mist eliminator; recalibrate surge controller setpoints; update operating procedure
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.parts_replaced: LCV-101 actuator diaphragm; positioner feedback arm; scrubber mist eliminator pad

AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.work_description: Compressor vibration analysis and oil sample
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.findings: All parameters within acceptable limits. Lubrication topped up.
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.actions_taken: Compressor vibration analysis and oil sample

AREA-WATER:E-301.work_description: E-301 produced water cooler performance degradation — outlet temperature trending 15°C above design value over past 90 days. Approach temperature analysis confirms fouling factor exceeds TEMA limit. Scheduled for offline cleaning.
AREA-WATER:E-301.findings: Heavy calcium carbonate scale (2-4mm thick) on shell-side tube OD. Flow distribution affected — first 3 baffles blocked >60%. Scale inhibitor injection pump found under-dosing by ~30% due to plugged check valve.
AREA-WATER:E-301.actions_taken: Chemical descaling with 15% HCl solution; hydroblast tube bundle; re-assess scale inhibitor dosing rate (increase by 25%); install differential pressure indicator across bundle for early detection
AREA-WATER:E-301.parts_replaced: Tube bundle gaskets x4; inlet nozzle isolation valve packing

AREA-WATER:E-301.work_description: HX differential pressure and performance check
AREA-WATER:E-301.actions_taken: HX differential pressure and performance check

AREA-WATER:E-301.work_description: HX differential pressure and performance check
AREA-WATER:E-301.findings: Vibration readings acceptable. Trend history reviewed — no deterioration noted.
AREA-WATER:E-301.actions_taken: HX differential pressure and performance check

AREA-UTIL:PT-145.work_description: PT-145 export header pressure transmitter reading discrepancy — PT-145 reading 8-12 bar above PT-146 (redundant). Zero drift pattern confirmed over 5 days of trending. Transmitter flagged as BAD ACTOR.
AREA-UTIL:PT-145.findings: Fill fluid leakage from diaphragm capillary confirmed. Diaphragm face shows micro-pitting consistent with H2S stress corrosion cracking. Wetted materials review recommended for entire PT-145 series batch.
AREA-UTIL:PT-145.actions_taken: Replace PT-145 with Emerson 3051S HART transmitter; upgrade wetted materials to Alloy 400; review remaining pressure transmitters for same diaphragm batch
AREA-UTIL:PT-145.parts_replaced: Emerson 3051S pressure transmitter; impulse tubing; isolation valve

AREA-WATER:P-303.work_description: P-303 cooling water pump trip — seal failure with loss of CW flow. Downstream heat exchangers showing rapid temperature rise. P-304 standby pump started immediately. Cascade temperature rise observed on E-301, E-201A/B within 20 minutes.
AREA-WATER:P-303.findings: Dual mechanical seal found completely failed. O-ring elastomer shows swelling and cracking consistent with thermal cycling and possible dry-run. Suction strainer 40% blocked — contributing to reduced NPSH and potential cavitation/dry run events during low tide.
AREA-WATER:P-303.actions_taken: Replace dual mechanical seal assembly with upgraded AISI 316 faces; install low-suction-pressure trip at 0.3 bar; review suction vessel level control
AREA-WATER:P-303.parts_replaced: John Crane Type 21 mechanical seal assembly; shaft sleeve; impeller wear rings

AREA-UTIL:FAC-001.work_description: Annual Turnaround AT2024 — statutory facility-wide inspection and maintenance programme. Includes: all PSV bench testing, vessel internal inspections, ESD and HIPPS functional testing, heat exchanger bundle removals, rotating equipment overhauls, NDT programme, electrical thermography.
AREA-UTIL:FAC-001.findings: All safety-critical items passed. 3x corrosion allowance reductions noted on HP separator V-101 nozzles — engineer assessment required. Generator G-401 found with worn fuel injectors replaced proactively. Flare tip burn-out confirmed — replacement scheduled for AT2025.
AREA-UTIL:FAC-001.actions_taken: Complete all planned maintenance activities per turnaround scope: vessel inspections, PSV testing, relief valve overhauls, instrumentation calibration, electrical thermography
AREA-UTIL:FAC-001.parts_replaced: Multiple — see Turnaround Final Report AT2024-RPT-001

AREA-EXPORT:P-501.work_description: SAFETY EVENT — Gas release on export header. Fixed gas detector GD-501 activated at 20% LEL. ESD activated. Personnel evacuation initiated. Source identified as 8" export header weld neck flange NPA-EXP-FLG-047. Area declared safe after 45 minutes; ESD reset and restart commenced.
AREA-EXPORT:P-501.findings: Spiral wound gasket blowout at flange NPA-EXP-FLG-047. Flange faces found with H2S pitting — material loss up to 0.4mm. Previous maintenance records show gasket installed during AT2023; over-torquing noted (bolts found at 125% of spec). HSE near-miss report NM-2024-047 raised.
AREA-EXPORT:P-501.actions_taken: Replace spiral wound gasket with ASME B16.20 Inconel 825 ring gasket; dress flange faces; re-torque to specification using calibrated torque wrench; update bolting procedure to include anti-seize compound
AREA-EXPORT:P-501.parts_replaced: Spiral wound gasket x1; flange bolting set x1; GD-501 sensor cartridge
